job_title: Business Intelligence Engineer , North America Network Sales and Operations planning
strengths: Strong SQL and Python ETL experience
Built production ELT pipelines and CI/CD
weaknesses: No explicit Redshift or Oracle experience
Unclear years of total relevant experience vs requirements
improvement_bullets: Optimized relational database queries (CTEs, window functions, joins) in PostgreSQL and MySQL to clean and reconcile testing data, improving data accuracy by 60% and demonstrating advanced SQL skills for large, multi-dimensional datasets.

Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%, showcasing experience in developing automated reporting and advanced visualization solutions.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), eliminating repetitive data entry, saving 8 hours per week, and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions, utilizing scripting for automation and data pipelines.

Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend, demonstrating experience with design of experiments and statistical analysis of results.

Architected a production-grade ELT pipeline in Python and SQL to ingest time-series economic data into BigQuery, enabling fast reporting and forecasting, modeling raw API data into a dbt star schema to optimize query performance, and automating data quality validation with Great Expectations, showcasing data modeling, warehousing, and ETL pipeline experience.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
Amazon.com

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Business Intelligence Engineer, North America Network Sales and Operations planning position at Amazon.com. With my background in data analysis, operations leadership, and full-stack development, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

I have long admired Amazon.com's commitment to innovation and its relentless pursuit of customer obsession, particularly how the company leverages data to optimize its vast supply chain operations. The opportunity to contribute to the Network S&OP team, which forms the critical starting point for crucial planning processes, is particularly compelling.

In my previous roles, I have developed advanced analytical models and automated reporting solutions to drive significant business improvements. Additionally, I have a proven track record of collaborating with stakeholders to translate complex data insights into actionable strategies, which directly aligns with your need for a Business Intelligence Engineer who can build advanced visualization solutions and analyze data for senior leadership.

At Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows that reduced data mismatches and improved work efficiency by 40%. I also built Python automation for weekly reports, saving 8 hours per week and enhancing reporting accuracy. My experience at Haven Technologies further honed my skills in optimizing relational database queries and transforming user feedback into production-ready code, driving a 15% increase in feature adoption. Furthermore, my FRED Economic Batch Pipeline project involved architecting a production-grade ELT pipeline in Python and SQL, modeling data into a dbt star schema, and deploying it via a CI/CD pipeline, showcasing my experience with data modeling, warehousing, and ETL pipelines.

I am particularly drawn to Amazon.com's mission of being Earth's most customer-centric company and believe my experience in developing forecasting models, building advanced visualization solutions using Tableau and Power BI, and my strong SQL and Python skills would allow me to contribute meaningfully from day one. I am adept at analyzing and interpreting large, multi-dimensional datasets and am eager to apply my statistical analysis skills to improve forecasting accuracy within your network.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
